understanding.goal_understanding: Navigate the character on the tile grid to reach the goal gem tile (+) within the turn/attempt limits, avoiding losing by landing on spike hazards (u/v) and using clicks/moves to create a viable fall path in the direction of gravity.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a horizontal move (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT) or CLICK (or UNDO). After any horizontal move, gravity automatically pulls the character in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid support tile (o/m/w), hit a hazard (u/v) and lose immediately, or reach the goal (+) and win. CLICK targets a specific coordinate to interact with clickable tiles, primarily removing breakable blocks (x) to open a fall path; clicks do not move the player. UNDO reverts the previous action to recover from a bad click or move. The structured state provides left/right landing previews and a corridor scan to identify passage columns that drop to a different y-level; moves should prioritize safe passages and avoid landings on spikes.
